column1: # url:      Leave EMPTY for amazon — WhereToBuy auto-generates a search URL from the item name.
#           Fill in an ASIN URL (e.g. https://amazon.com/dp/BXXXXXXX?tag=...) when you have one.
# isPrimary: true = shown by default; false = shown after "Show more retailers"
# price: numeric (e.g. 12.99) or blank for unknown
# currency: USD | GBP | EUR — required when price is set
# lastCheckedISO: ISO date string when price was last manually checked (e.g. 2025-03-01)
# ── Amazon UK rows (auto-generates search URL at runtime) ─────────────────
